items.title: Welcoming the New Basketball HS Coach
items.description: We are excited to introduce our new High School Basketball Head Coach. Get ready for a season of discipline, teamwork, and faith in action.

items.title: 1st PTF Meeting & Depression Management Seminar
items.description: Join us for our first Parent-Teacher-Faculty meeting, alongside an insightful seminar on managing mental health among students.

items.title: New School Paper Adviser Announced
items.description: We welcome our new School Paper Adviser, who brings fresh vision and leadership to the HDICS school publication.

items.title: PEAC Recertification — Successfully Achieved
items.description: HDICS has successfully completed its PEAC Recertification, affirming our ongoing commitment to quality, standards, and Christ-centered education.
